nasb.text: “Oh that You would hide me in Sheol, That You would conceal me until Your wrath returns to You, That You would set a limit for me and remember me!

esv.text: Oh that you would hide me in Sheol, that you would conceal me until your wrath be past, that you would appoint me a set time, and remember me!

cnv.text: 但願你把我藏在陰間， 把我隱藏，直到你的怒氣過去； 願你為我定一個期限，好記念我。

ccb.text: 但愿你把我藏在阴间， 把我藏起来直到你息怒， 定下眷顾我的日期。
